name: Royal Flush Merge
author: Poki
description: Royal Flush Merge is a funny merge game where your mission is to fight off endless waves of poops that are dumped by a unicorn! Start with a simple rubber plunger, merge two to create stronger and funnier cleaning tools, and keep upgrading to flush those pesky poops away. Can you handle the chaos and keep the toilet clean? How to play Royal Flush Merge? Click and hold to move and merge items. Who created Royal Flush Merge? Royal Flush Merge is created by Resurrected Studio. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Royal Flush Merge for free? You can play Royal Flush Merge for free on Poki. Can I play Royal Flush Merge on mobile devices and desktop? Royal Flush Merge can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
